d:
Small Android app for getting notified (friends, messages, groups and notifications)
while being privacy-friendly. It doesn't require the Facebook Platform to be turned
on. It should be low on the battery usage.

AntiFeatures:
* NonFreeNet: You are required to log in to Facebook.

Source code: https://github.com/gsurrel/FacebookNotifications
Issue tracker: https://github.com/gsurrel/FacebookNotifications/issues
Changelog and release notes: https://github.com/gsurrel/FacebookNotifications#changelog

License: MIT
Author: gsurrel - https://gregoire.surrel.org/
